title: HOTUT Wine Bottle Stoppers, 3 Pack Bottle Saver Sealer Wine Corks, Bottle Topper Reusable Champagne Stop for Wine Champagne Prosecco Beer Spirits Collection, Round
features: Health & Safety: Our wine bottle stoppers are crafted from high-quality plastic and durable silica gel, ensuring that these reusable bottle savers are sturdy, safe, and rust-free, perfect for preserving your favorite beverages
Simple to Operate: Designed for convenience, these bottle stoppers easily fit into bottles with a diameter of 15-20mm. Simply insert the stopper, and you're set to keep your drinks fresh

Keep Fresh: With our reusable bottle saver pourer sealer, you can prevent your wine, champagne, and prosecco from deteriorating. These wine bottle stoppers help maintain freshness and keep the fizz in your bubbles for weeks on end

Great Drinks Saver: Not just for wine, our versatile wine corks bottle stoppers are ideal for parties and gatherings. Use them to seal open bottles of champagne, prosecco, or even beer, ensuring your drinks stay bubbly and delicious

Enjoy Your Favourite Bubbly Anytime: The wine bottle stoppers are essential barware accessories for your kitchen and home bar. Invest in these reusable bottle saver pourer sealers to ensure everything left in the bottle is kept fresh and fizzy, ready for you to enjoy whenever you like
description: Features: - Wine bottle stoppers seal wine, champagne, beverages, soda, oil and vinegar. Keep drinks or liquids in the bottle fresh without spilling. - These corks aren’t just for serving wine, they’re also great at parties and gatherings, keeping your champagne fizzy or your uncorked prosecco watered down. - Prevent your champagne/wine from spoiling and losing its tantalizing flavors, keep your champagne fresher longer and keep the fizz in the bubbles for weeks with our wine stoppers. Specification: Material: plastic + silicone Size: 9.1*2.1cm The Package Includes: 3 Pcs Wine Bottle Stoppers Notice: 1. Due to manual measurement, there may be a certain size error. 2. Due to the shooting environment, there may be a certain color difference.
